tool.name: port_scanner
tool.description: TCP/UDP port scanning and service detection for network reconnaissance.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Scan specific TCP ports on a target host - Quick scan of common/well-known ports - Service detection with banner grabbing - UDP port scanning (less reliable) - Identify running services and their versions

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The scanning action to perform: - scan_tcp: TCP connect scan on specified ports - scan_udp: UDP port scan (less reliable, slower) - scan_common: Scan top 100 common ports quickly - detect_service: Scan and identify services with banner grabbing

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Target host IP address or hostname to scan

parameter.name: ports
parameter.description: Ports to scan. Formats: "22,80,443" or "1-1000" or "22,80,100-200". Not required for scan_common action.

returns.description: Scan results including open ports, services, and banners

tool.examples:
# Scan specific TCP ports
scan_tcp 192.168.1.1 22,80,443,3306,8080
# Quick scan of common ports
scan_common 10.0.0.1
# Service detection with banner grabbing
detect_service target.example.com 22,80,443
# Scan a port range
scan_tcp 192.168.1.1 1-1000
